mapper.select: SELECT class_teacher.*, sys_user.nick_name FROM class_teacher left join sys_user on class_teacher.user_id = sys_user.user_id WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY is_leader DESC, class_id ASC
SELECT class_teacher.*, sys_user.nick_name FROM class_teacher left join sys_user on class_teacher.user_id = sys_user.user_id WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND class_teacher.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_teacher (class_id, user_id, user_name, is_leader, status) VALUES (#{classId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{isLeader}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE class_teacher SET is_leader = '0' WHERE class_id = #{classId}
UPDATE class_teacher SET is_leader = '1' WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT class_teacher.*, sys_user.nick_name FROM class_teacher left join sys_user on class_teacher.user_id = sys_user.user_id WHERE class_teacher.user_id = #{userId} AND class_teacher.status = '0' LIMIT 1
